text:
Case Lifecycle
Stage
Triage
Starting point
Case enters the Support queue (creation or
re-opening)
Case is assigned
Case Goal
definition
Investigation
Case goal validated by customer
Solution
implementation
Resolution &
closure
A solution is validated
The solution implementation is accepted,
Early resolution (intentionally or by the
customer becoming non-responsive)
End point
Case is assigned
Case goal validated
by customer
A solution is validated
Solution is
implemented
Case is closed
Purpose
Determine who needs to be involved and
assign the case to an owner
Define and confirm the case goal, to ensure
the right problem is being solved
Define problem statements, investigate
hypotheses and select a solution to
implement
Implement the selected solution to the
problem
Close case and update all required assets
